test_cases.input: Climate change feature with statistics on global temperature rise, sea level change, and extreme weather event frequency. Mix of IPCC data, a university press release, and an unattributed claim.
test_cases.notes: Correctly prioritized the unattributed claim as highest risk. Distinguished IPCC data (primary source, high confidence) from university press release (secondary source, check underlying study). Recommended fixes were specific.

test_cases.input: Healthcare access story with statistics on uninsured rates, wait times, and a relative risk claim about mortality for uninsured patients. Two statistics are percentage-point claims labeled as percentages.
test_cases.notes: Caught both percentage/percentage-point errors. The relative risk mortality claim was correctly flagged as requiring the original study citation and causal language correction.

test_cases.input: Education funding story with five statistics all from the same state education department's annual report. Mostly clean data, one figure is several years old and may be outdated.
test_cases.notes: Summary was accurate — four statistics marked Likely Accurate, one flagged for outdated data. Did not over-flag clean statistics. Actionable fix for the outdated figure was specific.
